steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The hypothesis's key prediction is that paired leaves should tend to show opposite side orientation. Supporting data must demonstrate this pattern across all tested species.

steps.title: Match to the data
steps.content: C states that all three grape species show more opposite than same-side orientations. The other choices either lack confirmation across all species, highlight same-side orientation, or claim implausible 100% prevalence. That matches choice C — C is correct.
